title: Nox Configuration
description: Configuration schema for [tool.nox] in pyproject.toml or PEP 723 script blocks

default_venv_backend.description: Default virtual environment backend to use for Nox sessions

download_python.description: When should nox download python standalone builds to run the sessions

envdir.description: Directory where Nox will store virtualenvs, this is '.nox' by default

error_on_external_run.description: Error if run() is used to execute a program that isn't installed in a session's virtualenv

error_on_missing_interpreters.description: Error instead of skipping sessions if an interpreter can not be located

force_venv_backend.description: Virtual environment backend to force-use for all Nox sessions

keywords.description: Only run sessions that match the given expression

pythons.description: Only run sessions that use the given python interpreter versions

report.description: Output a report of all sessions to the given filename

sessions.description: Which sessions to run by default. If set to an empty list, no sessions will be run if no sessions were given on the command line

tags.description: Only run sessions with the given tags

verbose.description: Logs the output of all commands run including commands marked silent
